Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A tale about fixing eBPF spinlock issues in the Linux kernel 97 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. A Decade of Slug 609 upvotes, 58 comments
  3. More than 135 open hardware devices flashable with your own firmware 226 upvotes, 23 comments
  4. Celebrating Tony Hoare's mark on computer science 27 upvotes, 1 comments
  5. Write up of my homebrew CPU build 63 upvotes, 7 comments
  6. Unsloth Studio 283 upvotes, 53 comments
  7. Mistral AI Releases Forge 450 upvotes, 95 comments
  8. JPEG Compression 176 upvotes, 36 comments
  9. Review of Microsoft's ClearType Font Collection (2005) 20 upvotes, 1 comments
  10. Show HN: Sub-millisecond VM sandboxes using CoW memory forking 159 upvotes, 39 comments
  11. Electron microscopy shows ‘mouse bite’ defects in semiconductors 74 upvotes, 17 comments
  12. Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss' 682 upvotes, 234 comments
  13. (Media over QUIC) on a Boat 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  14. Launch HN: Kita (YC W26) – Automate credit review in emerging markets 43 upvotes, 10 comments
  15. The pleasures of poor product design 119 upvotes, 39 comments
  16. Leviathan (1651) 66 upvotes, 20 comments
  17. It Took Me 30 Years to Solve This VFX Problem – Green Screen Problem [video] 240 upvotes, 96 comments
  18. Show HN: Pgit – A Git-like CLI backed by PostgreSQL 37 upvotes, 11 comments
  19. Why AI systems don't learn – On autonomous learning from cognitive science 119 upvotes, 50 comments
  20. Get Shit Done: A meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven dev system 334 upvotes, 163 comments
  21. I Simulated 38,612 Countryle Games to Find the Best Strategy 24 upvotes, 6 comments
  22. Python 3.15's JIT is now back on track 374 upvotes, 195 comments
  23. Have a fucking website 400 upvotes, 222 comments
  24. Launch an autonomous AI agent with sandboxed execution in 2 lines of code 39 upvotes, 14 comments
  25. Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks 244 upvotes, 130 comments
  26. Animation 10k Starlink Satellites 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. Forget Flags and Scripts: Just Rename the File 37 upvotes, 35 comments
  28. Aggregated File System (AGFS), a modern tribute to the spirit of Plan 9 6 upvotes, 3 comments
  29. Honda is killing its EVs 326 upvotes, 697 comments
  30. Ndea (YC W26) is hiring a symbolic RL search guidance lead 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 6:00pm, 18 March 2026. Source here.
